channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Boys Soccer CIF Division IV SoCal State Regional Championship: Pacific Ridge 3, Central Union 2
item.description: The CIF Division IV Boys Soccer SoCal Regional State Championship featured two San Diego Section teams, as the Pacific Ridge Firebirds hosted the Central Union Spartans.
item.dc:creator: Chase Izidoro, Fox 5

item.title: Super Bowl stars Josh Sweat and Milton Williams headline a list of NFL free agents
item.description: NFL teams can start reshaping their rosters by signing free agents this week. There’s plenty of attention on the quarterbacks, including Sam Darnold, Russell Wilson and Justin Fields.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Russell Henley with a late charge and a big eagle wins Bay Hill for biggest career win
item.description: ORLANDO, Fla. (AP) — Russell Henley faced one shot he hardly ever practices. On another shot, he figured he had little chance for the ball to stay on the green.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FERGUSON, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Boys Rugby: Cathedral Catholic 28, La Costa Canyon 17
item.description:
The High School Boys Rugby Championship was held in Del Mar as the Cathedral Catholic Dons hosted the La Costa Canyon Mavericks.
It was the Dons who came out victorious, defeated La Costa Canyon by a score of 28-17, to win their 5th straight Rugby Championship.
item.dc:creator: Chase Izidoro, Fox 5

item.title: Allende scores to lead Miami past Charlotte 1-0 with Messi again watching from the bench
item.description: FORT LAUDERDALE, Fla. (AP) — Tadeo Allende scored 17 seconds into the second half and Inter Miami won its third straight match without Lionel Messi, beating Charlotte FC 1-0 on Sunday. Messi has not played since a win over Sporting Kansas City on Feb.
item.dc:creator: ALANIS THAMES, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Ovechkin scores 886th career goal into an empty net to move 9 back of breaking Gretzky's NHL record
item.description: Alex Ovechkin scored his 886th career goal into an empty net to move nine back of breaking Wayne Gretzky's NHL record.
item.dc:creator: Stephen Whyno, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Man United draws 1-1 with Arsenal after brilliant late save denies Bruno Fernandes
item.description: MANCHESTER, England (AP) — A stunning double save from David Raya denied Bruno Fernandes a dramatic late winner for Manchester United against Arsenal in the Premier League on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: JAMES ROBSON, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Bowling Green hires former NFL star running back Eddie George as coach
item.description: BOWLING GREEN, Ohio (AP) — Bowling Green hired former NFL running back and Tennessee State coach Eddie George on Sunday as the Falcons' head coach.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Nearing the end of a short spring, Dodgers, Cubs make final preparations for season opener in Japan
item.description: GLENDALE, Ariz. (AP) — Shohei Ohtani's bat is ready for the Los Angeles Dodgers while Shota Imanaga has looked good on the mound for the Chicago Cubs with less than 10 days remaining before baseball's regular-season opener in Japan. The teams will play two games at the Tokyo Dome on March 18 and 19.
item.dc:creator: DAVID BRANDT, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Bills release Von Miller in salary cap-saving move: Report
item.description: The move frees up at least $8.4 million in salary cap space, which comes close to matching how much the team was projected to be over the limit.
item.dc:creator: JOHN WAWROW, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Colorado Springs upset CMU Mavericks to secure RMAC Championship
item.description: UC Colorado Springs defeated Colorado Mesa 63-61 to win the RMAC championship, with Amyah Moore Allen scoring 28 points and Olivia Reed Thyne scoring 18 points.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: Yanni Gourde back where he belongs, in Tampa Bay
item.description: The Tampa Bay Lightning organization believes that adding two elite forwards Yanni Gourde and Oliver Byorkstrand will be the push they need to make a deep playoff run.
item.dc:creator: Aileen Hnatiuk, WFLA, NBC

item.title: White Sox reassign top 2 prospects to minor-league camp, team announces Thursday
item.description: GLENDALE, Ariz. — The White Sox reassigned two of their top prospects to minor-league camp, one a west suburban native, the team announced Thursday morning prior to its spring training game against the San Francisco Giants.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Special Olympics Illinois athletes head to Italy for snowshoe races
item.description: On Wednesday, a team of Special Olympics Illinois snowshoe athletes boarded a plane to New York, with a final destination of Turin, Italy. There they will compete in the Special Olympics Winter World Games.
item.dc:creator: Erin McElroy, NewsNation

item.title: CMU Swimming is ready to chase their first National Championship
item.description: If there was ever a year for Colorado Mesa Swimming and Diving to bring home the program's first-ever national championship, this is the year.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: Bulls Fest 2025: Team announces dates, registration open for 3v3 tournament
item.description: CHICAGO — Registration is now open for Bulls Fest 2025, which will be held outdoors on the United Center campus from Aug. 23-24, the team announced this week.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Baseball: Santa Fe Christian 3. Valhalla 2
item.description: SAN DIEGO (KUSI)- Baseball first game of the season for Santa Fe Christian who won a low scoring game against Valhalla 3-2. Eagles were paced by sophomore Kyle Plasman, young man was on a good one out the gate, 3 for 4 with three doubles. A fantastic pitching performance by senior Kam Lohse.
item.dc:creator: Nick James, Fox 5

item.title: 49ers donate $20K in equipment to 3 Santa Clara high schools
item.description: (KRON) -- Students and athletes at three Santa Clara high schools will be stepping up their game after the San Francisco 49ers recently donated more than $20,000 worth of workout and football training equipment.
item.dc:creator: Ryan Mense, KRON4

item.title: Jimmy Johnson retires from Fox Sports after being face of NFL coverage for most of 3 decades
item.description: Jimmy Johnson, the Pro Football Hall of Fame coach who won two Super Bowls and a college national championship, announced his retirement from Fox Sports on Monday after being part of its NFL coverage for most of the network's 31 years.
item.dc:creator: Eric Olson, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Shoeless Joe Jackson's personal scrapbooks hit auction
item.description: NEW YORK (WGN) — A pair of scrapbooks belonging to "Shoeless" Joe Jackson are up for bid over the next two weeks. Offered by Leland's Auctions, up for bid is a collection of Joe Jackson's personal scrapbooks obtained directly from Jackson's family.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9
